projects.title: Our
projects.subTitle: Explore a selection of our most recent work. From animated landing pages to complex systems.

method.title: Our method:
method.subTitle: Strategy, design, and development: step by step towards your digital success.

step1.title: 1 - Brand DNA
step1.desc: Before coding, we define your identity. We choose colors, typography, and a tone of voice that connects with your customers. We create a solid visual foundation that represents your business's essence and translates seamlessly to your social media.

step2.title: 2 - UX/UI Design in Figma
step2.desc: We create a navigable prototype in Figma. You'll see how your website will look before we write a single line of code. We build exact replicas so there are no surprises.

step3.title: 3 - Web Development (Next.js)
step3.desc: We translate the design into real code using React and Next.js. We focus on clean, semantic, and SEO-optimized code, ensuring fast and scalable loading.

step4.title: 4 - Self-management with Strapi
step4.desc: We integrate Strapi CMS so you have full control. Change texts, images, or manage your blog easily without depending on us. A website that grows with you.

WhyNext.intro: We build custom engineering solutions, not generic templates. We bet on Headless architecture to guarantee three critical pillars for your business:

perf.title: Real Performance
perf.desc: Loads in milliseconds. Google loves Next.js speed, natively optimizing your SEO. Faster webs, more conversions.

security.title: Total Security
security.desc: By not using vulnerable third-party plugins, your site is practically immune to common PHP hacks. We protect your data and reputation.

design.title: Design Freedom
design.desc: Exact Figma replicas with pure CSS. We don't fit your business into a generic template; we create the technology your brand needs.

items.name: Carlos Rodríguez

items.name: Laura Martínez
items.title: Marketing Manager
items.quote: Working with them was a great decision. They don't just program, they understand business logic. The system is robust, secure, and very easy to use.

items.name: Marta Soler
items.title: Founder, InnovaLab
items.quote: Moving from WordPress to this Headless system was the best decision. Security and technical performance are on another level compared to what we had before.

items.q: What are the advantages of working with an integrated design and development team?
items.a: By being a direct team of senior UX design and fullstack development, we eliminate the communication silos of large agencies. This ensures that creative vision and technical feasibility walk together from day one.

items.q: Why do you use Next.js instead of WordPress?
items.a: For high-performance projects, Next.js offers superior loading speed, better technical SEO, and security that WordPress cannot match. It's the technology used by companies like TikTok or Twitch.

items.q: Do you create exact replicas of Figma designs?
items.a: Yes. Our process guarantees total fidelity. By mastering both design and development, we ensure that every animation, spacing, and typography translates to code exactly as approved.
Completely. We integrate modern CMS like Strapi or Sanity so you can edit texts and images without touching a single line of code.

items.q: Are your websites optimized for mobile devices?
items.a: Mobile-First design is our standard. We ensure an impeccable user experience on smartphones and tablets, maintaining animation fluidity and loading speed on any device.

items.q: Is it possible to integrate external tools like payment gateways or calendars?
items.a: Yes, we have experience integrating third-party APIs like Stripe, Calendly, or marketing automation platforms, ensuring the web becomes an operational tool for the business.

items.q: What happens once the website is published?
items.a: We don't disappear after launch. We offer a warranty period and support to resolve doubts, plus maintenance plans to keep technology and security always up to date.

items.q: How do you integrate social media and video strategy into the website?
items.a: We design the web as the core of a digital ecosystem. We create interfaces optimized to receive traffic from social media and facilitate conversion, integrating visual content and professional video with total coherence.

items.q: How do you manage technical SEO in your developments?
items.a: Unlike visual builders, our custom development allows total control over site structure, metadata, and speed—factors that Google prioritizes to rank websites in top results.

items.q: What does the social media management and strategy service include?
items.a: We offer a comprehensive solution ranging from defining content pillars and tone of voice, to visual creation (design and video) and strategic post scheduling. The goal is for the brand to have an active and professional presence without the client needing to invest time in it.

items.q: How do you ensure social media content is coherent with the website?
items.a: Thanks to our team structure, the web's UX design and social media art direction are born from the same creative concept. This ensures the user's transition from an Instagram post to the landing page is fluid, professional, and generates immediate trust.

items.q: Why is it important to have a high-performance website if I already have social media?
items.a: Social media are acquisition channels, but the website is your digital property where conversion happens. We develop sites in Next.js so that when a user clicks a link from your profile, the page loads instantly and is optimized to close the sale or capture the contact.
